Package com.nib.commons.io.vsam

Class AbstractIOClass

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.AbstractIOClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
IVsamApi
public abstract class AbstractIOClass extends Object implements IVsamApi

    Retrieves the next Relative Buffer Address (RBA) that can be used for appending records to the VSAM file.

  • Method Details

    • methodNotImplemented

      protected void methodNotImplemented(String s)

    • checkVsamSqlException

      protected void checkVsamSqlException(IOOperation op, SQLException e) throws FileIOException
      Throws:
      FileIOException

    • defineCluster

      public void defineCluster(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Defines a cluster for the given file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      defineCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while defining the cluster

    • defineAix

      public void defineAix(FileDescriptor fd, KsdsKey kf, boolean rebuildIndexes) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Defines an Alternate Index (AIX) for the specified file descriptor using the provided key definition.

      The AIX allows for efficient access to records in a Key Sequenced Data Set (KSDS) file based on an alternate key.

      Specified by:
      defineAix in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      kf - the key definition for the AIX
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while defining the AIX

    • deleteCluster

      public void deleteCluster(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes the cluster associated with the specified file descriptor.

      This operation removes the entire VSAM cluster, including all data sets and indexes associated with it.

      Specified by:
      deleteCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the cluster

    • deleteAix

      public void deleteAix(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes the Alternate Index (AIX) associated with the specified file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      deleteAix in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the AIX

    • alterCluster

      public void alterCluster(FileDescriptor ofd, FileDescriptor nfd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Alters the cluster associated with the old file descriptor to match the configuration specified in the new file descriptor.

      This operation updates the VSAM cluster's attributes, such as the allocation parameters, data set name, and key structure, to match the configuration specified in the new file descriptor.

      Specified by:
      alterCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      ofd - the old file descriptor representing the existing VSAM cluster
      nfd - the new file descriptor representing the desired VSAM cluster configuration
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while altering the cluster

    • rebuildIndexes

      public void rebuildIndexes(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Rebuilds the indexes associated with the specified VSAM file.

      This operation reconstructs the indexes for the VSAM file, which can help optimize access and improve performance.

      Specified by:
      rebuildIndexes in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while rebuilding the indexes

    • open

      public void open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Opens the VSAM file with the specified open mode and lock mode.
      Specified by:
      open in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      openMode - the mode in which the file should be opened (e.g., Input, Output)
      lockMode - the lock mode to apply when opening the file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while opening the file

    • read

      public int read(KsdsKey keyDef, byte[] keyValue, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified key definition, key value, and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      keyDef - the key definition used for reading
      keyValue - the key value to search for
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the record

    • read

      public int read(Rrn rrn, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified Relative Record Number (RRN) and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) of the record to read
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the record

    • read

      public int read(Rba rba, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified Relative Buffer Address (RBA) and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rba - the Relative Buffer Address (RBA) of the record to read
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the record

    • write

      public void write(byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Writes a record to the VSAM file.
      Specified by:
      write in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      record - the record to write
      reclen - the length of the record
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing the record

    • write

      public void write(Rrn rrn, byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Writes a record to the VSAM file using the specified Relative Record Number (RRN).
      Specified by:
      write in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) where the record should be written
      record - the record to write
      reclen - the length of the record
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing the record

      public void write(Rba rba, byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Writes a record to the VSAM file using the specified Relative Buffer Address (RBA).
      Specified by:
      write in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rba - the Relative Buffer Address (RBA) where the record should be written
      record - the record to write
      reclen - the length of the record
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing the record

    • rewrite

      public void rewrite(KsdsKey keyDef, byte[] key, byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Rewrites a record in the VSAM file based on the specified key definition and key.
      Specified by:
      rewrite in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      keyDef - the key definition used for rewriting
      key - the key value to search for
      record - the new record to write
      reclen - the length of the record
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while rewriting the record

    • rewrite

      public void rewrite(Rrn rrn, byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Rewrites a record in the VSAM file based on the specified Relative Record Number (RRN).
      Specified by:
      rewrite in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) of the record to rewrite
      record - the new record to write
      reclen - the length of the record
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while rewriting the record

    • rewrite

      public void rewrite(Rba rba, byte[] record, int reclen) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Rewrites a record in the VSAM file based on the specified Relative Buffer Address (RBA).
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      rba - the Relative Buffer Address (RBA) of the record to rewrite
      record - the new record to write
      reclen - the length of the record

    • delete

      public int delete(KsdsKey keyDef, byte[] keyValue, boolean generic) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes a record from the VSAM file based on the specified key definition and key value.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      keyDef - the key definition used for deletion
      keyValue - the key value of the record to delete
      generic - true if the deletion should be generic (delete all matching records), false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of records deleted
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the record

    • delete

      public void delete(Rrn rrn) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes a record from the VSAM file based on the specified Relative Record Number (RRN).
      Specified by:
      delete in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) of the record to delete
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the record

    • close

      public void close() throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Closes the VSAM file.
      Specified by:
      close in interface IVsamApi
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while closing the file

    • count

      public int count(FileDescriptor fd) throws CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Returns the count of records in the VSAM file represented by the given file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      count in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Returns:
      the count of records in the file
      Throws:
      CatalogException - if an error occurs while accessing the catalog information

    • getNextRbaToAppend

      public Rba getNextRbaToAppend() throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Retrieves the next Relative Buffer Address (RBA) that can be used for appending records to the VSAM file.
      Specified by:
      getNextRbaToAppend in interface IVsamApi
      Returns:
      the next available RBA
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while retrieving the next RBA

    • exportData

      public long exportData(SequentialFile target, boolean append, int batchSize) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Exports the contents of the VSAM file to the specified Sequential File.
      Specified by:
      exportData in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      target - the Sequential File to export the contents to
      append - if true, append data to the file
      batchSize - the size of the export batch (in rows)
      Returns:
      the number of records exported
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while exporting the contents

    • importData

      public long importData(SequentialFile source, int batchSize, boolean validateKeyOrder, boolean replace) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Imports the contents of a sequential file into VSAM file.
      Specified by:
      importData in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      source - the source sequential file
      batchSize - the size of the batch JDBC operation
      Returns:
      the number of records imported
      Throws:
      FileIOException

      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Returns the last RRN written

      retrieveLastRrnWritten in interface IVsamApi
      Returns:
